programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Love the One You're With
programme.desc: The survivors from the crash are asked to make an almost impossible decision that will affect the rest of their lives. Meanwhile, tension grows between Jackson and April after they're forced to work together.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: I Saw Her Standing There
programme.desc: Aware that Derek might never operate again, Meredith stops talking about the surgeries she's performing. Meanwhile, Richard calls on Dr. Catherine Avery to help him perform a complicated procedure, as things continue to heat up between Jackson and April.

programme.title: The Closer: Dead Man's Hand
programme.desc: Captain Raydor approaches Major Crime about looking into a possible case of spousal abuse involving one of her female officers. Brenda and Raydor discover there is more to the story when another officer kills the abused woman's husband.

programme.title: The Closer: The Big Bang
programme.desc: The shooting death of a man taking pictures of the stars from his balcony leads the squad to look closely at the husband of the woman with whom the victim was having an affair. The investigation is hindered by a missing murder weapon.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Year-End Blowout
programme.desc: A year-end-blowout sale becomes literal for a used car lot after one of its owners is killed when a bomb explodes. While the squad tries to find who is responsible, Rusty attempts to catch the person threatening his and Sharon's life.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The squad must work quickly to track down a serial killer before he strikes again. Meanwhile, things get dangerous over a game of chess.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Return to Sender
programme.desc: The unit draws closer to finding a dangerous serial killer. Rusty faces his biggest challenge yet when he takes the stand against Phillip Stroh. Meanwhile the team goes head to head with a touch attorney.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Flight Risk
programme.desc: When a father and his two young children go missing, the squad has to work quickly to find them, while uncovering a slew of terrible family secrets along the way. Meanwhile, Raydor does her best to trust Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Personal Day
programme.desc: Shorty after being released from prison, a man who proclaimed his innocence is found murdered. The victim's case is reopened and the squad works hard to solve a 17-year old murder. Meanwhile, Rusty confesses the reason behind his suspicious activity.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Interrupted
programme.desc: A family interrupts a burglary in their upscale suburban home. The masked gunman kills two and wounds two more. Police suspect the crime is related to a string of thefts in the area, but a closer look at the crime scene reveals the real motive and killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Saturday
programme.desc: 'The Brian and Beverly Mauck Case - an attractive young couple is found dead in their Graham, Washington home and all signs point to a professional hit. But dogged investigators discover some valuable evidence that proves otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In the Bag
programme.desc: A little boy is found alone and in a panic. When police go to his home, they find his grandparents dead in their bedroom.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Dr. Death: You're Next

programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Building a Legacy: Foundations First
programme.desc: Marty breaks ground on massive foundation posts for his cabin. Misty and Maciah begin an innovative greenhouse that requires lumber, but Matt and Katie must first troubleshoot the new sawmill and an aerial supply mission faces turbulent skies.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Building a Legacy: Endings and Beginnings
programme.desc: The family risks another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build as Marty struggles to complete the cliff-top cabin. Misty and Maciah begin their own dream cabin on the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: New Horizons
programme.desc: The Raney clan races to finish two cabins before snow hits but lose Marty to a devastating fall. In danger of losing everything, the Raneys must rally to finish their cabins, harvest the garden and mount a moose-hunting expedition.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part One
programme.desc: The Raneys must build a dam and plan an entire cabin move to help the Smith family in a Missouri flood zone.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: $1 Million or Bust
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two
programme.desc: Marty's dam is put to the test as the Raneys move an entire cabin into the flood zone. A surprise arrival of chicks has Misty needing an upgrade for her chicken coop. Matt crafts a knife blade in the Smiths' newly improved foundry.

programme.desc: The Raney clan races to finish two cabins before snow hits but lose Marty to a devastating fall. In danger of losing everything, the Raneys must rally to finish their cabins, harvest the garden and mount a moose-hunting expedition.

programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two
programme.desc: Marty's dam is put to the test as the Raneys move an entire cabin into the flood zone. A surprise arrival of chicks has Misty needing an upgrade for her chicken coop. Matt crafts a knife blade in the Smiths' newly improved foundry.

programme.title: Expedition X: The Beast of Bray Road
programme.desc: Josh Gates, Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres are hot on the trail of a werewolf-like creature terrorizing locals in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts and sightings lead them to a remote forest where frightening clues may reveal the beast's true identity.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: Heeeeere's ... Joshy!
programme.desc: It's a monster of a show as Josh talks to the real Freddy Kruger, Robert Englund, Seth Green from Buffy the Vampire Slayer and Gremlins director Joe Dante.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: How a Mousetrap Can Cure Your Hangover
programme.desc: When Chuck finds himself with a hangover, Mike Rowe has a cure that has roots in a geophysical contracting company and a 19th-Century carriage maker.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: How a Horseshoe Can Find Your Soulmate
programme.desc: In 1797, a blacksmith invented the innovative cast-iron plow. Now, Mike Rowe traces the connection between the blacksmith's handy work and modern-day technology that makes online dating and falling in love possible.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: How a Volcano Redeemed a Rapper
programme.desc: When Eminem accepted his Record of the Year Grammy in 2001, he didn't consider thanking a volcano for his win but maybe he should have! Mike Rowe connects the dots between Eminem's success and a massive 1815 volcanic explosion.

programme.title: Six Degrees With Mike Rowe: How a Sheep Can Do Your Taxes
programme.desc: Solar technology became all the rage after the grandson of a famous physicist flew around the world in a solar plane. Mike Rowe dives deeper into the story, revealing how mechanized production and a demand for whale oil led to this alternative energy.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Onion Processor
programme.desc: Mike spends the day working as an onion processor, slicing dicing and tasting.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Gourd Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the middle of Connecticut to clean out a lake, and then drops by a gourd farm in Pennsylvania and transforms gourds into a variety of products.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wine Maker
programme.desc: Mike travels to the Napa Valley and gets extremely dirty as he takes on the unappealing job of making wine. Mike then rolls up his sleeves and gets dirty at a Kansas Cattle Ranch where he gets a lesson on how dirty the cattle business can be.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bologna Maker
programme.desc: Mike heads to Pennsylvania and tries his hand at making bologna and then goes to Alaska to repair a very special toilet.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Camel Rancher
programme.desc: Mike heads to a unique dairy farm in Ramona, CA where he learns how to milk, care for and breed dromedary camels.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Turkey Inseminator
programme.desc: Mike crawls through rat drops, falling insulation and debris to make a house more energy efficient and he visits a turkey farm where he gets to suck semen out of a bunch of large-breasted birds.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: $1 Million or Bust
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Goldslingers
programme.desc: With new claims up for grabs, old faces return to Nome's wild west as Mr. Gold launches his biggest season. Kris' Elim plan hits a hiccup. Vernon hustles to assemble his dream team. Emily searches for her own claim. Zeke attempts an ambitious creation.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Not a Safe Place
programme.desc: Renee's living situation became life threatening after emergency medical responders where not able to get in her front door after she had fallen unconscious in her home. Deemed unliveable by the state, Renee realizes she has to make a change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Jennifer and Marissa's Story
programme.desc: Jennifer and her daughter Marissa are stuck in a codependent relationship that has put both of their lives in jeopardy, with a combined weight of over 900-lbs. See if Jennifer can regain control and save both their lives before it's too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Angie J- Part 2 - Where Are They Now?

programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Strike While the Iron's Hot

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Just Act Natural
programme.desc: It will be a hardcore competition between veteran Indian chef Thomas John when he takes on personal chef Gail Arnold. Chef Bobby Flay has two excellent friends in the front row to watch, The Barefoot Contessa, Ina Garten, and Neil Patrick Harris.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby vs. Food
programme.desc: "Food Network Star" winner Eddie Jackson brings in the ultimate battle buddy, "Man vs. Food's" Casey Webb, to throw all the manpower they can at Bobby Flay. Fine dining expert Eric Bolyard and seafood aficionado Sarah Wade duke it out for a shot at Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: By Land or By Sea

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's a Lotta Ciabatta

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Too Biggs To Fail

programme.title: Chef Boot Camp: Show Me the Intensity
programme.desc: Chef Cliff Crooks mentors a 23-year-old head chef with too much attitude at her family's restaurant, an owner in Brooklyn, MD, who needs to be more assertive and a former hotel owner in Kempton, PA, who sold the business but stayed on to run the kitchen.

programme.title: Jessie: New York, New Nanny

programme.title: Jessie: Used Karma
programme.desc: After Jessie accepts an invitation for lunch with Tony, the building's doorman, Emma offers Jessie unsolicited dating advice she has learned from her stash of teen magazines. Meanwhile, Ravi becomes the target of Luke's practical jokes.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Champ-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Diggie is getting ready to leave for Australia when he realizes he wants to get back together with Maddie. He isn't sure she feels the same. Diggie tries to talk with her, but she's swamped with the team winning the state championship.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Continued-A-Rooney
programme.desc: While Joey and Maddie try to catch Diggie before he departs for Australia, Liv covers for Maddie at home. But when Diggie shows up at the Rooney house, chaos ensues, reminding Parker of his favourite soap opera drama.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Club Owners & Quinceaneras
programme.desc: When Austin hears that a big-time club owner will be at Trish's Quinceañera, the gang plans a stand-out performance to ensure Austin gets noticed. Trish invites Dallas to the party, and Ally is nervous about dancing with him.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Songwriting & Starfish
programme.desc: The gang tries to help Austin get ready for the Hot Summer Jam Contest on the beach, where he could win a chance to have his song played on the radio. Meanwhile, Ally tries to put her previous unpleasant beach-going experiences behind her.

programme.title: Jessie: Glue Dunnit: A Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Jessie is tasked with ungluing Mrs. Chesterfield's hands from her head, while Ravi attempts to uncover who switched Mrs. Chesterfield's hair gel with glue.

programme.title: Jessie: Tempest in a Teacup
programme.desc: Emma and Zuri plan a romantic mystery-filled fifth first date for Jessie and Tony. Ravi, Cameron and Bertram get stuck in a giant teacup on a billboard.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Malediktator (The Queen's Battle Part 3)
programme.desc: When Chloe threatens to leave Paris, Mr. Bourgeois gets akumatized into Maledikator. Invested with absolute power, he wants to make his daughter's dreams come true.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Sandboy
programme.desc: Marinette finds out that a mysterious supervillain is bringing the Parisian's bad dreams.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Scrambled Pets
programme.desc: Sofia and her friends regret their decision to bring their pets to school after Clover and the rest of the animals get scrambled in a sorcery class accident.

programme.title: Sofia the First: Mom's the Word
programme.desc: Sophia becomes disheartened that she has to share her mom with Amber and James during their annual Mother's Day picnic. She asks Lucinda, a witch, to cast a spell so that she and her mom can be alone and learns a lesson on sharing.

programme.title: Bluey: Dunny/ Duck Cake/ Handstand
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny'. Bluey wants to help Dad make Bingo's birthday cake. Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.

programme.title: Bluey: The Show/ Ticklecrabs/ Escape
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey put on a Mother's Day show! The kids play Tickle Crabs with Dad! Bluey and Bingo get dropped off at Nana's.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/ Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hug-A-Pip/ Out of Control Tower
programme.desc: A tenacious penguin and a kind hearted flamingo train to be delivery birds.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Team Cutie Patooties/ The Adorable Artist
programme.desc: When Freddy selects only babies to be on their team for the big TOTSball game, Pip questions his decision. Pip and Freddy encourage a baby python to express himself through art.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Pyramid Scheme/ Special Delivery
programme.desc: Bongo and Rolly travel to Egypt to find the Great Pyramids. Then, the pugs try to deliver a Mother's Day card for Bob.

programme.title: Bluey: Mr. Monkeyjocks/ Typewriter/ Burger Shop
programme.desc: The adventures of Bluey, a loveable puppy who lives with her parents and little sister.

programme.title: Bluey: Library/ Swim School/ Bin Night
programme.desc: Muffin plays the game of library her way. Mum, Dad and Bingo must pass Swim School. Bluey, Bingo and Dad always take out the bins.

programme.title: Bluey: The Quiet Game/ Postman/ Cafe
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo play The Quiet Game. When Mum and Dad have a disagreement, Bluey makes Dad write a love letter to Mum. In the park, Bluey meets a new playmate, Winnie.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Frozer
programme.desc: A figure skating trainer named Philippe gets akumatized into Frozer. Armed with evil ice skates, he wants to turn Paris into a Kingdom of Ice.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Style Queen (The Queen's Battle, Part 1)

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer

programme.title: Jessie: We Don't Need No Stinkin' Badges

programme.title: Jessie: Panic Attack Room
programme.desc: Everyone gets trapped in the penthouse panic room after Stuart changes the passcode to get alone time with Zuri. Meanwhile, Bertram and Emma help Jessie with an upcoming audition.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed

programme.title: Snapped: Janeene Jones
programme.desc: Allegations of real estate fraud and and rumors of murder have Sarasota Police on the tail of a criminal whose final plan to evade trouble lands her in the very hands she tried to avoid.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Landing
programme.desc: Heather Elvis was a young woman eager to make her mark on the world. Then she disappeared. Investigators discovered a love triangle and thought they had their motive. But there was a question the Elvis family still needed answered: Where was Heather?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Watcher
programme.desc: Lauren Giddings was smart, charismatic and a newly-minted law school graduate. She had dreams of becoming a public defender, then she was brutally murdered. Her killer tried to pull off the perfect crime, but a secret recording exposed the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: A top doctor known for saving lives found himself fighting for his own after he was poisoned. Investigators immediately started looking into the women in his life, wondering if one relationship was toxic.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Footprint in the Dust
programme.desc: Susie Casey was an outgoing mother of four going through a divorce. She was twenty steps from her front door when she vanished. Police were investigating three men in her life. They were all there the morning of her murder.

programme.title: Killer Motive: Motorcycles, Murder and Mystery/ A Healthy Dose of Murder
programme.desc: An outspoken radio personality and veterans' advocate is gunned down in her own bedroom. Did her strong opinions make her a target, or did a litany of family secrets lead to her murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Pamela Lanier
programme.desc: A woman's innocence is called into question after her husband dies from a mysterious malady and encourages detectives to take a deep dive into her past.

programme.title: Snapped: Georgia Watson
programme.desc: When a man is ambushed by a firestorm of bullets outside his home, investigators follow a twisted trail of suspects to a vindictive mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Carol Carlson
programme.desc: When a Kapowsin, Washington mother is discovered murdered on her couch in a compromised position, investigators must piece together all the evidence to determine if this was a random crime of opportunity or a façade to humiliate the victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Minnie Salinas
programme.desc: Police race for answers after an adored school teacher is found dead in her San Antonio apartment. A string of lies and betrayal comes to light, but when the case goes cold, one detective refuses to give up.

programme.title: Snapped: Debra Banister
programme.desc: When two sisters' husbands turn up dead within weeks of each other, Florida detectives investigate whether the cases are a tragic coincidence or if they're related by something other than blood.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Michelle Young was married to her college sweetheart and pregnant with their second child when she was murdered. In the search for her killer, detectives uncovered a marriage riddled with secrets but cracking this complicated case took years.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Night of the New Moon
programme.desc: Diana Lovejoy and her husband welcomed a baby boy, but then, their marriage crumbled. A bitter custody battle followed. Fearing for her safety, Diane turned to a man skilled in self-defense but, it turns out, someone else was in grave danger.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Lover's Chair
programme.desc: A couple's romantic evening atop Rockefeller Lookout in New Jersey ends with the wife's tragic death. Her death is ruled an accident, but a decade later investigators uncover a web of lies forcing them to take another look at the case.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Unholy Secrets
programme.desc: A pastor places a frantic 911 call, pleading for help to save his fiancée who he says just shot herself. As investigators follow the unravelling truth, and look closer at the crime scene, a darker side to this happy relationship stuns everyone.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Twisted Betrayal
programme.desc: When a devoted mother with a bright future in show business is ruthlessly gunned down, a number of suspects emerge, but just as detectives think they have the killer in their sights, the investigation takes a jaw dropping turn.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Hidden Betrayal
programme.desc: A civic minded teen is shot to death in his own bed, but just as investigators are closing in on those responsible, a jaw dropping twist leaves everyone stunned.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Driven to Murder
programme.desc: When police find the body of a popular taxi driver stuffed inside the trunk of his own car submerged in a river, they struggle to find suspects until the truth reveals a terrible plot to get revenge.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: The Mayor’s Wife
programme.desc: After a respected educator and mother of two is found dead in small-town Alabama, the investigation focuses on fraught family relationships, but the discovery of a dark secret unveils a killer no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil and Bobbi Parker
programme.desc: It's a mystery with a mind-boggling twist. The deputy warden's wife claimed she was kidnapped by an escaped convict and held captive for more than a decade. But was she really a hostage or a willing accomplice?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mr. Plow
programme.desc: Homer becomes Mr. Plow but competition gets out of hand when Barney gets in on the action.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: Mr. Burns organizes a mountain retreat to promote teamwork and finds himself paired with Homer. While the rest of the family looks for things to do, Homer and Mr. Burns are trapped in the cabin by an avalanche.

programme.title: The Simpsons: King of the Hill

programme.desc: The Taronga Zoo attempts to create history by successfully exporting two platypuses to America.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Down Under: Bush Fire Rescue
programme.desc: A look at what makes the Taronga Zoo in Sydney, Australia run.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: A Cold Day in Tampa
programme.desc: The ZooTampa team prepares the animals for the wintry Florida weather.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Two and a Calf Kittens
programme.desc: The youngsters are causing trouble! A very pregnant rhino waits and waits to give birth, two orphaned panther kittens explore new environments, and a young zebra tries to dodge a checkup.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Monster Graveyard
programme.desc: At a mysterious site in the Gobi Desert, experts have discovered a monster graveyard, and this groundbreaking find contains the treasures of the alien beasts that once lived in this strange world.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in Paradise
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stalin's Secret Atlantis
programme.desc: When experts spot what appears to be an abandoned city in the Caspian Sea, they investigate declassified Cold War evidence to reveal an Atlantis-like city built by the Soviets; what they find exposes its long-lost secrets.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in Paradise
programme.desc: A bizarre, tentacled black mass emerges from the seas on an island in the Caribbean, and on-lookers are horrified as it writhes ashore; experts use cutting-edge tech to investigate the origin of this alien invader.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stalin's Secret Atlantis
programme.desc: When experts spot what appears to be an abandoned city in the Caspian Sea, they investigate declassified Cold War evidence to reveal an Atlantis-like city built by the Soviets; what they find exposes its long-lost secrets.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Mystery of the Cannibal Crypt
programme.desc: Mysterious tomb carvings provide dark evidence that ancient Egyptians practiced cannibalism, but we don't know why. New discoveries might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Armageddon on the Nile
programme.desc: Cataclysmic changes in ancient Egypt might have been caused by an extraordinary set of international phenomena, and the latest tech helps identify the supernatural culprit. What experts discover reveals a truth stranger than fiction.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Mystery on Easter Island
programme.desc: Archaeologists have struggled for centuries to understand the ancient moai statues of Easter Island and the purpose behind their mysterious placement; now, experts use cutting-edge tech to finally reveal the hidden logic behind their cryptic locations.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: War of the Ancients
programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Legend of the Cursed Temple
programme.desc: A temple to the Roman god of the underworld was the site of ritual sacrifice and a gate to the underworld, but it was buried because it was believed to be cursed. Experts use cutting-edge forensics to reveal what actually happened here.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Riddle of the Child Mummies
programme.desc: Archaeologists make a shocking discovery when the perfectly preserved remains of three children are unearthed from the frozen mountains of Argentina; using state-of-the-art forensics, experts investigate the bizarre circumstances behind this grisly scene.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Tomb of the Red Queen
programme.desc: In an abandoned Maya city, an archaeologist discovers the tomb of a mysterious red skeleton decorated in jade and pearl treasures; experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal who this person was and why they were buried so.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder on the Reservation
programme.desc: On the northern Cheyenne Indian reservation, a young mother goes missing after the Fourth of July. When her body is discovered in the woods, the victim's family dig through the memories of their loved one to provide investigators with critical clues.

programme.title: American Monster: By God, That's Enough
programme.desc: When single mom Michelle Chaffin finds love, it seems like the perfect case of opposites attract. But when Michelle vanishes without a trace, police uncover a terrible jealousy revealed through a shocking confession that leaves her family reeling.

programme.title: Diabolical: Recording Evil
programme.desc: Gina Coccia comes home from work to discover the bodies of her girlfriend Lynn, and Lynn's nephew, Ronnie, shot and stabbed on the kitchen floor. The investigation that follows will lead police, to a months long plot and a terrifying act of betrayal.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Watcher
programme.desc: On a rare day off from work, single mom Carrie Caudill and a friend embark on a well-deserved girl's night out. But out of nowhere, an unexpected confrontation puts Carrie on a dangerous collision course with a calculating and sadistic madman.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A 63-year-old man is gunned down in his own home just days before Christmas. As investigators in Spokane, Washington dig into the victim's business life in search of a motive, they uncover a host of shady deals and a few desperate men.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A 63-year-old man is gunned down in his own home just days before Christmas. As investigators in Spokane, Washington dig into the victim's business life in search of a motive, they uncover a host of shady deals and a few desperate men.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Poisoned by Love
programme.desc: Norma Hawkins grew up in fear of her mother, Shirley Allen. For years, Norma watched in horror while Shirley's anger destroyed those closest to her. But when people started dying, Norma had to find the courage to turn in her own mother to police.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Locked Away
programme.desc: After a college graduate goes missing from her parents' home, investigators must rely on quick thinking and cunning police work, as they race against the clock to find her before it's too late.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Creek Bottom
programme.desc: College student and aspiring teacher Tammy Crowe has everything to live for, but on her way to a friend's dinner party, Tammy's life takes an unexpectedly devastating and violent turn.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Curse of Dismal Creek
programme.desc: Sean Farmer travels to a remote campsite in Virginia for a fishing trip with his friend Scott Johnston. When a mysterious stranger appears, the area's dark past returns to haunt the campers.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: John Doe 57
programme.desc: When a tip from a missing person’s network helps identify the body of a John Doe murder victim, investigators question the victim's family and friends to find the killer, and ultimately unravel a dark tale of betrayal.

programme.title: The Missing: Missing Teens
programme.desc: A teenager goes for a bike ride and never comes back. Clues emerge, but nothing ever comes of it. Then, a teen goes out with friends and fails to return home to celebrate her mom's birthday.

programme.title: The Missing: Out the Door
programme.desc: Jesse Ross goes on a school trip to Chicago, but never returns to his hotel room. He is seen on video, but police find no trace of him. And then Alexis Scott leaves a party in Peoria, Illinois, but police can't track her down.

programme.title: Little Boy Lost: An ID Mystery
programme.desc: Jealousy, heartbreak and deceit. When 7-year-old Kyron Horman vanishes, investigators suspect his stepmother had a hand in his disappearance. In this one-hour special, Kyron's mother searches for answers as the family saga takes many bizarre turns.

programme.title: Disappeared: Walk Into Darkness
programme.desc: Tammy Kingery disappears after leaving work sick. Her family finds a note saying she's gone for a walk from their home in the woods, but searches yield no signs. An investigation reveals secrets that lead to dark theories about the mother of three.

programme.title: Disappeared: Gone In An Instant: Restless Spirits
Homicide Hunter: My, My Mysteries: Fight or Flight
Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent. Then A shooting in a dive bar leads to a quick arrest, but Kenda can't quite shake the feeling that something is amiss.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The Last Days of Phil Hartman
programme.desc: In the early hours of May 28, 1998, Phil's wife, Brynn, fatally shot him before she died by suicide. Now, over 20 years after their deaths, a two-hour ABC News television event details Phil's life, legacy and tragic murder.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Hate Kills
programme.desc: A rumored hate crime disproven; a seasoned criminal gets a second chance; a defendant shouts an eerie message; a woman accused of attempted murder screams at a judge; and a man shoves a deputy then bolts.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mothers Who Kill
programme.desc: These stories will shock you and make you wonder what would drive a woman to murder her own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Doom For Rent
programme.desc: In order to make ends meet, a woman rents out a room in her home to a younger man. But when her finances are jeopardized, she invites another to live with them as well creating a toxic mix of suspicion, accusations, rage, and murder.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Blood and Fury: America's Civil War: Battle of Petersburg

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.desc: A growing family finds a seaside fixer upper in Surfside Beach, Texas.

programme.desc: After years of vacationing in the area, a woman and her grandmother are ready to purchase a home of their own in the coastal community of Anna Maria Island, FL.

programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Southern Charm

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Francisco: Second Bite
programme.desc: San Francisco's food scene is so impressive, it deserves a second trip. From Japanese hot pots and hand-crafted lasagna to ice cream made from locally sourced ingredients, Andrew explores the city's culinary history and diversity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Phoenix
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the multicultural cuisine of Phoenix, Ariz. A heavy Mexican influence is present throughout the restaurant scene in dishes like chilaquiles and pazole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite

programme.title: Wipeout: Tumble Sleep Eat Repeat
programme.desc: LARPers, worm farmers, and a pair of surfing siblings are among the dynamic duos battling it out on the Wipeout course for a $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Wipeout: Invasion of the Big Balls
programme.desc: Wipeout is back with the most challenging course in history! Aerialists, UFO-ologists and puppeteers are all battling to be crowned the Wipeout champion and take home the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Movie: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Rick and Evelyn return to save the world after their son accidentally resurrects an evil Chinese emperor.

programme.title: Movie: Ready Player One
programme.desc: After the creator of a virtual reality world dies he leaves a treasure behind in the game that will give control of the virtual world to whoever finds it. An idealistic young man races an evil corporation to be the one who gets to control the future.

programme.title: Movie: Doctor Strange
programme.desc: When a neurosurgeon loses the use of his hands in an accident, he finds himself at a mystical enclave. Healing his hands, he trains there as a sorcerer. When a new threat emerges, he must decide whether to return to his life or defend the world.

programme.title: Odd Squad: O Is Not for Over
programme.desc: In this two-part story, Olive gets the opportunity to run her own Odd Squad and Otto gets a new partner. Both Odd-Todd and Otto aren't thrilled with the recent changes.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/ D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur isn't sure he's ready for a baby in the house; nobody told D.W. babies cry so much.

programme.title: BBC World News: America
programme.desc: Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: BBC World News Today
programme.desc: A comprehensive program of news, business news and analysis.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: In-depth analysis of current events with news summaries, discussions, and news pieces.

programme.title: The Ivory Tower
programme.desc: David Chanatry hosts this discussion about local events with academicians.

programme.title: Washington Week
programme.desc: Yamiche Alcindor makes her debut as the show’s new moderator. Her inaugural panel will include Dan Balz, Errin Haines, Weijia Jiang and Jake Sherman.

programme.title: New York NOW
programme.desc: Journalists discuss events involving New York state politics and government.

programme.title: Great Performances: Uncle Vanya
programme.desc: Experience Anton Chekov's masterpiece in this Olivier Award-nominated West End production adapted by Conor McPherson starring Toby Jones and Richard Armitage from London's Harold Pinter Theater.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Senator Amy Klobuchar (D-MN) discusses the explosive growth of big tech and corporate mergers. She outlines her proposed antitrust reforms to fight back against monopolies and explains why every American should be paying attention.

programme.title: Great Performances: Uncle Vanya
programme.desc: Experience Anton Chekov's masterpiece in this Olivier Award-nominated West End production adapted by Conor McPherson starring Toby Jones and Richard Armitage from London's Harold Pinter Theater.

programme.title: Philly D.A.
programme.desc: LaTonya 'T' Myers lands her dream job fighting for probation reform, but any slip-up could send her back to prison. At the same time, the D.A.'s team pursues systemic probation reform, facing off against judges who embrace extended supervision.

programme.title: The Chavis Chronicles
programme.desc: Dr. Chavis goes beyond the headlines offering insights on matters that impact the public.

programme.title: Between the Covers: Mamta Chaudhry
programme.desc: Mamta Chaudry's debut novel 'Haunting Paris' is a timeless story of love and loss.

programme.title: Classical Stretch: By Essentrics: Balance
programme.desc: This workout will strengthen the core and improve balance.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays the Blues/ Buster's Sweet Success
programme.desc: Although Arthur's piano teacher is retiring, she assures him that the new teacher is outstanding. Then, Arthur meets Dr. Fugue, who is as strict as he is odd, and begins to doubt his own abilities. Buster eats all of his fundraiser chocolates.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Grandpa's Drum/ Have Canoe, Will Paddle
programme.desc: Molly finds an old photo of Grandpa as a child and is shocked to see him singing and drumming. / The Qyah Canoers are ready for their first competition. There’s just one problem: Molly, Tooey, and Trini don’t know how to canoe!

programme.title: Wild Kratts: Mini Madagascar
programme.desc: With no big land predators, Chris realizes that Madagascar is one of the safest places in the world for adventuring.

programme.title: Hero Elementary: Monumental Problem/ Super Lift
programme.desc: When a nose accidentally breaks off one of the faces on Hero Hill, our heroes must figure out how to repair the monument. Sparks' Crew tries to help change a broken wheel on a hot dog cart, so they learn how to life a heavy object using a lever.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum: I Am Zora Neale Hurston/ I Am Charles Dickens
programme.desc: Our heroes meet an exceptional storyteller, Zora Neale Hurston; Our heroes meet a young Charles Dickens.

programme.title: Curious George: George and Marco Sound It Out/ A Monkey's Duckling
programme.desc: George is so anxious for Dumpling Duck's eggs to hatch that he takes over as chief egg-sitter.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Line Leader Daniel/ Neighborhood Jobs
programme.desc: Daniel learns the importance of the neighborhood jobs when he and Mom Tiger fill in as librarians.

programme.title: This Old House: A Project for Every Floor

programme.title: Ask This Old House: Inspection, Door Restoration
programme.desc: Heath performs an electrical inspection; the team share more Home Inspection Nightmares; Tom helps two homeowners meticulously restore their antique front door using a variety of techniques.

programme.title: American Woodshop: Suzy' Barn Woodshop Highlights
programme.desc: See the corkscrew willow staircase creation, make a holiday accent, restore outdoor chairs and learn bandsaw sign making here.

programme.title: Motorweek

programme.title: Ciao Italia: From the Sea/ Del Mare

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire: Killer Barbecue - Hold the Meat

programme.title: Best of the Joy of Painting

programme.title: Painting With Wilson Bickford: Bridging the Gap (Covered Bridge)
programme.desc: Wilson continues work on his painting by developing the old, rustic covered bridge.

programme.title: Fit 2 Stitch
programme.desc: Jewelry-maker Molly Schaller finds inspiration and meaning in birthstone colors.

programme.title: Fons & Porter's Love of Quilting: Dash for Scraps
programme.desc: Angela Huffman crafts a design out of an assortment of scraps.

programme.title: Garden Smart
programme.desc: Horticultural experts from across the U.S. share their knowledge and gardening experience.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Doubt
programme.desc: When Kelton is found murdered, Voight’s grudge against the mayor elect puts him under suspicion. Upton and Halstead are eager to prove their sergeant’s innocence, but the more evidence they gather, the closer they come to doing the opposite.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Assets
programme.desc: When Atwater goes undercover in a dangerous South Side drug syndicate, he learns there may be more to its kingpin than meets the eye.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Familia
programme.desc: After a botched carjacking turns out to be something much bigger, Voight’s unit goes toe-to-toe with a smart drug kingpin who only works with women.

programme.title: Movie: Avengers: Age of Ultron
programme.desc: Tony Stark tries to revive a dormant peacekeeping program -- a self-aware, self-teaching artificial intelligence known as Ultron. The plan backfires when Ultron decides that humans are the enemy, and Earth's Mightiest Heroes must stop his fatal plans.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Ties That Bind
programme.desc: The team travels to a Wisconsin gun show to take down a supplier who's manufacturing 'cop killer' machine guns. Before going undercover together, Burgess discovers that Upton is dating Ruzek.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Good Men
programme.desc: Using information from Chicago Fire's Cruz, Intelligence chases down the robbery crew using the lockbox key. Voight is under pressure to bring the crew to justice without tarnishing the reputation of a murdered firefighter who might have been involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Forgotten
programme.desc: Voight's 'stay out of politics' stance is challenged as Intelligence uncovers the details surrounding a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Garbage Strike
programme.desc: Monk finds himself adrift in an ocean of filth when a garbage strike brings San Francisco to a halt, and Adrian to near-paralysis.

programme.title: Monk: Mr. Monk and the Big Game
programme.desc: Julie and her teammates hire Monk to investigate the death of their coach.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A mother of four dies unexpectedly on Valentine's Day. Everyone in town assumes she died of natural causes until a detective suspects someone has gotten away with murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery on the Mississippi
programme.desc: A mother of four dies unexpectedly on Valentine's Day. Everyone in town assumes she died of natural causes until a detective suspects someone has gotten away with murder.

programme.title: Miz & Mrs.: Mizaninversary
programme.desc: Mike hustles to match Maryse's epic anniversary present, while Marjo learns the value of a dollar.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Silos
programme.desc: Intelligence investigates a gruesome case. Upon further examination, it appears the victim was wearing a CPD issued wire at the time of his death. Meanwhile, Burgess meets her new partner, who came from a terrible assignment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Made a Wrong Turn
programme.desc: When Burgess and Tay respond to a report of vandalism, they find a badly beaten young man. It appears the young man's fiancée is missing. Meanwhile, Lindsay has a surprise for Halsted, and Fogel berates Platt.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: All Cylinders Firing
programme.desc: When Platt goes to her father Robert's for dinner, she warns him to be careful with his new girlfriend, Natalie. As Platt is leaving her father's place, she is assaulted and rushed to Chicago Med.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Big Friends, Big Enemies
programme.desc: When a car plows through a crowd of concert-goers and gunfire erupts, Lindsay and Ruzek are on the scene. Unsure of the motive and concerned about terrorism, they order Homeland Security to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A War Zone
programme.desc: Intelligence is tasked with tracking down the dealers of fentanyl, a drug that has been linked to multiple overdoses around the city. As they investigate possible sources, the team uncovers a series of dealers in a college smuggling ring.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Some Friend

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: 300,000 Likes
programme.desc: Voight calls the team to investigate a homicide involving the only witness in a rape and murder case against an extremely young man. Intelligence investigates the accused's family to see if someone was paid to take out the victim.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Shot Heard Round the World

programme.desc: Wolverine and his brother, both great warriors and soldiers, stuck together through years of bloodshed. When Wolverine decides to leave the forces for a simpler life, his brother seeks revenge on Wolverine for leaving him.

programme.title: Family Guy: Undergrounded

programme.title: Family Guy: Rich Old Stewie

programme.title: Family Guy: Coma Guy

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dial 'N' for Nerder

programme.title: Bones: The Change in the Game
programme.desc: The unidentifiable and gruesome remains of a male bowler are found lodged in the automatic pinsetter of a bowling lane. With no clear lead in the case, Booth and Brennan go undercover and join the very competitive team in hopes of finding clues.

programme.title: Bones: The Memories in the Shallow Grave
programme.desc: When the Jeffersonian team identifies the remains of a woman found in a paintball field, they discover two missing-persons reports in her file. Booth and Sweets interrogate the victim's husband and learn that she suffered from amnesia.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Movie: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: After a year of dating, an American woman accompanies her boyfriend to Asia to attend his cousin's wedding, and discovers that his family is incredibly rich. She finds it difficult to be accepted, especially by his domineering and controlling mother.

programme.title: Arrow: The Secret Origin of Felicity Smoak
programme.desc: When a cyber attack brings Starling City to its knees, Oliver and Felicity are pushed to the limit trying to contain the destruction.

programme.title: Arrow: Guilty
programme.desc: A body is found strung up in the Wildcat gym, and Ted Grant is the main suspect. Oliver and Laurel argue over Ted's innocence. In a flashback, Maseo needs Oliver to remember where an informant for China White stashed key information.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: It Happened Last Night
programme.desc: The team is given a 22-hour deadline after the murder investigation of a Chief Warrant Officer who specialized in counterintelligence reveals his wife had been kidnapped and is being held for ransom.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Master of Horror
programme.desc: With New Orleans decorated for Halloween, the team investigates the murder of a naval staff Judge Advocate found in a cemetery dressed in a Victorian costume with vampiric puncture wounds on her neck. Meanwhile, the team debates Halloween night activity.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Watch Over Me
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a navy officer with the highest level top secret clearance who was recently assigned as a tech liaison with a private developer. Also, Pride transforms the carport into an auto shop.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Viral
programme.desc: Sebastian is placed on administrative leave after his response in a foot chase to apprehend a high value fugitive is questioned by the FBI. Also, while Pride and the team continue to track the target, they attempt to clear Sebastian's name.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Acceptable Loss
programme.desc: The murder of a petty officer leads Pride and his team to a mysterious woman who is targeting men with high security clearance. Also, Lasalle's father, Beau, arrives in town to discuss the family business.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: The Accident
programme.desc: NCIS is called to investigate after a clinical trial of brain implants in veterans is hacked. Also, Patton must work alongside his ex-wife, who spearheads the project.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Sins of the Father
programme.desc: Wade's son Danny calls Pride for help after he's attacked at his girlfriend's house and she goes missing. Also, the director of NCIS mandates that Pride meet with a therapist to discuss his process for solving cases.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Hard Knock Life
programme.desc: Pride second-guesses evidence suggesting homeless kids are the suspects in the murder of a petty officer.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Mirror, Mirror
programme.desc: After Rita Deveraux tells Pride that Douglas Hamilton is about to make a deal to get out of prison, Pride and the team rehash the Clearwater case in hopes of locating his mystery partner and spoiling his bargaining chip.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Monster
