programme.title: Movie: A Winter Getaway
programme.desc: When an average guy is gifted a luxury trip, he is mistaken as a millionaire. But then, sparks fly with the lovely concierge.

programme.title: Movie: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A woman shows her dog in a fancy New York dog show and the judge comes off as rude and aristocratic. A chain of misunderstanding unfolds during the competition, complicating the attraction they have for one another.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: Frasier: Momma Mia
programme.desc: Frasier thinks he's found the perfect love match in Mia, who is a replica of his mother.

programme.title: Frasier: Father of the Bride
programme.desc: Daphne grows more frazzled with her mother's plans for her impending marriage to Niles.

programme.title: Frasier: Radio Wars
programme.desc: Frasier is the unwitting victim of an on-air prank by his station's immature shock-jocks.

programme.title: Frasier: Everyone's a Critic
programme.desc: Frasier is jealous of Niles' perks and privileges as an arts critic for a snooty magazine.

programme.title: Frasier: The Dog That Rocks the Cradle
programme.desc: Roz hires Bulldog, her former lover who is now delivering pizzas, to babysit her daughter.

programme.title: Frasier: Rivals
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles become rivals when they are both smitten with the same woman.

programme.title: Frasier: A Tsar Is Born
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles are stunned when Martin appears on 'The Antiques Roadshow' TV program.

programme.title: Frasier: The Late Dr. Crane
programme.desc: A man posing as Frasier drops dead and the mix-up allows Frasier to read his obituary.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blind Ambitions
programme.desc: Rose's sister, Lily, can't accept the fact that now that she's blind, she needs help.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Big Daddy
programme.desc: Blanche's father, Big Daddy, comes to Miami for a visit, with an announcement; he's sold the family plantation and is setting out to become a country singer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Way We Met
programme.desc: One night after watching 'Psycho', the girls find it hard to sleep so they stay up and reminisce about how they all came to live with one another.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: End of the Curse
programme.desc: Blanche is mortified after taking a pregnancy test which indicates she's pregnant. Then after visiting her doctor, she learns the truth, she's beginning menopause.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ladies of the Evening
programme.desc: The house is fumigated and the girls move into a Miami Beach hotel. Previously, Blanche had won three tickets to see the opening of Burt Reynolds new movie and passes to the party held afterwards where they could meet him.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Take Him, He's Mine
programme.desc: Dorothy dumps a depressed Stan on Blanche so that she can go out with a naval officer.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: It's a Miserable Life
programme.desc: The girls petition to save an old oak tree on the property of a hateful woman.

programme.title: Movie: A Brush With Love
programme.desc: As she considers giving up on her artistic dreams, Jamie paints a vision board that brings her success and love - only to discover that the mystery man in her painting isn't who she thinks.

programme.title: Movie: Just My Type
programme.desc: A pop culture writer gets the opportunity of a lifetime when she is asked to interview an esteemed and reclusive author. Despite being from different worlds sparks ignite, which leaves her questioning her path in life.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Prince
programme.desc: Sparks fly when a woman meets a mysterious man at her parents store in small-town Georgia. When a photo of them is leaked to the press, she is shocked to learn that her potential suitor, is actually a king.

programme.title: Movie: Hearts Down Under
programme.desc: A restaurateur inherits a cafe in Australia so she makes the big move. While there, she meets a charming local chef.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Office: Casual Friday
programme.desc: Michael has to mediate a dispute within his new sales team. Meanwhile, trouble brews in the office when several employees take the term 'casual' Fridays too loosely.

programme.title: The Office: Cafe Disco
programme.desc: Michael gets into the café/ disco scene. Meanwhile, Pam and Jim decide to take a secret trip.

programme.title: The Office: Company Picnic
programme.desc: Michael and Holly are reunited at the annual Dunder Mifflin company picnic. Meanwhile, the office competes in the picnic's volleyball tournament.

programme.title: The Office: Gossip
programme.desc: Michael feels left out as the rest of the office gossips about the summer interns. While Michael searches for the next juicy rumour to share, Andy struggles with heterosexuality.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Rebound
programme.desc: Johnny becomes overly involved in Alexis's romantic life, while Moira offends the townspeople in an interview with 'People' magazine.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Sunrise, Sunset
programme.desc: Moira's former 'Sunrise Bay' producers show up with big news, while Alexis binge-watches old episodes of the soap.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: The Roses attend the Escape Room portion of David and Patrick's Bachelor Party, but their participation wanes the more their personal dilemmas come to a head.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Pitch
programme.desc: Johnny, Stevie and Roland head to New York for their pitch meeting, while the family anxiously awaits their return.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Start Spreading the News
programme.desc: Moira receives some unexpected news and David makes a tough decision about where he wants to live.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Happy Ending
programme.desc: As David stresses out over the rain on his wedding day, the family scrambles to make it right.

programme.title: Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Dulcé Sloan Does Archery
Doing the Most With Phoebe Robinson: Eric Nam Does K-Pop
programme.desc: To transform into a K-pop star, Phoebe enlists Eric Nam to help her record a song, learn choreography and film a music video.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Mystery of the Urinal Deuce
programme.desc: Cartman exposes the true culprit behind the September 11th attacks, uncovering the world's largest conspiracy of all time. Kyle and Stan hit the road in search of the truth and come face-to-face with the masterminds who pulled off the operation.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: South Park: Crack Baby Athletic Association
programme.desc: Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman's new business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: Board Girls
programme.desc: The annual Strong Woman competition pushes everyone to their limits.

programme.title: South Park: Doubling Down
programme.desc: Kyle is playing with fire when he gets in the middle of Cartman and Heidi's relationship.

programme.title: South Park: Douche and a Danish
programme.desc: Giant Douche wants out of the Presidential race.

programme.title: South Park: Fort Collins
programme.desc: An entire city in Colorado gets hacked. Gerald and Cartman may lose everything when their complete history of internet activity becomes public.

programme.title: South Park: Oh, Jeez
programme.desc: Gerald comes face-to-face with the Troll Hunter.

programme.desc: Jim and Pam have no choice but to go out with Michael and Helene, as their excuses have dried up. Dwight does nice things for the people in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots

programme.desc: The violent murder of an alleged rapist gives the squad the emotional task of questioning possible suspects. Meanwhile, Rusty begins to question his mother's motives as he catches her in a lie.

programme.title: Movie: Sinfidelity
programme.desc: A married woman has a one-night stand with a man, and he soon becomes obsessed with her. And he's not just a stalker- he's also a murderer.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by My Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the target of an obsessive neighbourhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her, even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: Movie: Suburban Swingers Club
programme.desc: A young couple makes a mistake when joining their local swinger's party becoming the target of a murderous neighbour.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Sister
programme.desc: As a top student at St. Adeline's Catholic Boarding School, Zoe senses that something is not quite right about the school's new nun, a sense proven to be true when it is revealed the ‘good’ nun is an imposter with a fatal attraction to Zoe's brother.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Barn
programme.desc: When a popular handyman in a New Hampshire town is found murdered investigators follow forensic clues to a shocking conclusion.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Family Tree
programme.desc: After the brutal slaying of a young couple on a road trip, the victims’ families begin receiving disturbing letters.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Letter
programme.desc: The sudden and mysterious death of a health conscious woman triggers an investigation into what killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: On the Rocks
programme.desc: The naked body of a young woman is discovered in a remote area leading forensic investigators on a search for clues to her identity and the identity of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: A Killer Disguise
programme.desc: A young mother is murdered in a crowded parking lot in broad daylight.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Human Sawdust
programme.desc: A suitcase leads to the gruesome discovery of a nearly perfect crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Three's a Crowd
programme.desc: As she left choir practice, the woman was gunned down in the church parking lot. Her husband became the prime suspect, particularly when police learned he found out just a month earlier that his wife had been cheating on him for three years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Squire's Riches
programme.desc: A man perishes in a fire while working inside his garage. Initially, the coroner rules the death an accident. But a Forensic Odontologist changes the direction of the case, as police unravel a bizarre case of stolen identity.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smoking Out a Killer
programme.desc: Three college students are killed walking along a footpath over the course of six years. Police know they're dealing with a serial killer, but the hard part is catching him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: When a respected business owner is brutally attacked and killed, investigators have to determine if it was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kidnapping
programme.desc: A family vacation turns into a manhunt for a missing wife and baby. When their worst fears are confirmed, police must switch gears to find a killer. With computer tracing, finger and palm print analysis, and DNA testing, investigators can solve the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sands of Crime
programme.desc: A college co-ed is abducted from the parking lot of her apartment building, and her body was found later that day. She’d been sexually assaulted and then shot at point blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Step by Step
programme.desc: A wealthy socialite died after falling down stairs, but was it an accident or was it murder? The laws of physics and an accident reconstructionist provided the answer.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Meatballs To Lollipops
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the local watering hole putting' a unique spin on standard bar food with the loaded chimi burrito and lobster lollipops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Standards, New Styles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is hitting up spots serving comfort food that has been turned up a notch. In Long Beach, CA., and old school diner with a new chef is cooking some home-style classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From the Seas and Lots of Cheese
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is diving into all sorts of off-the-hook flavors. First up, in the Florida Keys, Guy and Hunter are hittin' up a local landmark that's new to DDD but their deconstructed ceviche is the talk of the town.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Beef to Bao
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into dishes from beef to buns. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a funky peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken and Pie
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out some chicken and diving into some pie on this trip. In Portland, a Southern transplant is servin' up a killer chicken sandwich and hush puppies, and three sisters in Oklahoma City are puttin' their own funky spin on pizza.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All San Diego, All the Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's heading to San Diego for some favorites, old and new. In Ocean Beach, Calif., Guy's hittin' up a legendary surfer spot for some righteous burgers with an old buddy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pubs and Grub
programme.desc: Guy hits up a classic British pub in St. Louis, serving up gourmet Grilled Cheese, and a brewing station in Kill Devil Hills N.C. making righteous shrimp.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handcrafted
programme.desc: Guy checks in on tasty joints run by food fanatics, including a farm-to-table spot.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Portable Food
programme.desc: It's food on the move with Ina Garten as she shares pro tips for perfect portable eats. She makes moist lemon poppy seed cake for an afternoon snack at work and tomato mozzarella pan bagnat.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Mary Poppins Show
programme.desc: Ina Garten hosts an incredible Mary Poppins reunion sharing cooking secrets and making a British-style Sunday lunch for her friends who produced, directed and acted in the new movie. She shows Emily Blunt her foolproof roasted capon recipe.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes Made With Love
programme.desc: The Kitchen is celebrating Mother's Day with recipes made with love! Geoffrey Zakarian updates a dish from his mom's recipe box with easy Grilled Lamb Chops and Vegetable Skewers.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Mama Mia, What a Meatball!
programme.desc: Inspired by his mom's cooking, Michael Symon masters chicken parmesan meatballs on the grill. Later, Symon's wife Liz joins him to cook soft polenta over their fire pit. Then, Liz makes a simple vinegar and cream dressing for Michael's mom's garden salad.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Two Grills and One Mother-In-Law Inspired Meal
programme.desc: Michael Symon creates creamy chicken and dumplings on the grill. Michael's wife makes drop biscuits to serve as the dumplings while Michael picks fresh herbs for the filling. Finally, Michael makes bananas foster on the grill.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Mom Knows Best
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making her visiting mom's favorite food, starting with chocolate mousse and white clam pizza. Because her mom is interested in eating healthy, Ree also makes her so-good-for-you salad and garlic spinach spaghetti.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Mom Deliveries
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is honoring some of her favorite moms by making sweet deliveries. She starts with strawberry cheesecake brownies for her stepmom and a blood orange rosemary pound cake to pack up and mail to her mom, Gerre.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Mother's Day Made Easy
programme.desc: The Kitchen is giving Mom the day off and making Mother's Day easy. There's a bacon, onion and cheese tart, a shortcut sheet pan chicken a l'orange and limoncello ginger tiramisu, and the hosts create beautiful, colorful fruit boards.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Italian Comfort Food
programme.desc: Michael Symon mixes some childhood favorites and some new discoveries to make a relaxing Italian dinner with chicken milanese, a butternut squash and farro salad and some espresso granita.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Not Your Grandma's
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is looking for a spin on some classic family recipes. Maneet Chauhan makes Palak Paneer, Ming Tsai creates Cheesesteak Pot Stickers, Jonathan Waxman serves French-inspired Pierogis, and Hunter Fieri cooks up some Fish Tacos.

programme.title: Chopped: Alton's Challenge: Part 1
programme.desc: Alton takes over the kitchen for a five-part tournament. Alton demonstrates the science behind smoking foods and the chefs are to make every dish with smoky flavor including an exotic drink in basket number three.

programme.title: Chopped: Alton's Challenge: Part 2
programme.desc: In the second challenge, there's a dehydration theme for the baskets, as Alton demonstrates a home hack that makes removing moisture a breeze. A diabolical dessert basket has the chefs scrambling to make dehydrated eggs for their final plates.

programme.title: Chopped: Alton's Challenge: Part 3
programme.desc: The chefs explore the wonders of molecular gastronomy in the third Alton challenge. Transparent ravioli, modernist lamb, and a cake that looks and tastes like a drop of water challenge the chefs.

programme.title: Chopped: Alton's Challenge: Part 4
programme.desc: The chefs make a powder from a fat and are challenged by transparent ravioli in the appetizer round. The entree round offers a modernist method of cooking lamb. Finally, the chefs take on a cake that looks and tastes like a water droplet.

programme.title: Around the Horn
programme.desc: Host, Tony Reali, and sports reporters representing each time zone via satellite, banter about their local and national sports stories. Reali hosts and keeps score on every comment from his studio where he is connected to each columnist's newsroom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Best Man
programme.desc: Doug attends a wedding after discovering that Carrie and the groom were once lovers.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: DannyDonnieJoeJonJordan
programme.desc: When falling boxes trap Murray in the garage, he demands that Beverly get rid of everything except for one trunk. When the trunk goes missing, Murray becomes sentimental about what was inside while Erica has trouble parting with her stuff.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Darryl Dawkins Dance
programme.desc: As the Sadie Hawkins dance approaches, Erica asks Beverly to help her find Barry a date to keep him away from Lainey. But Beverly comes up with a girl that shocks everyone. Meanwhile, Adam gets into a fight with his best friend, Pops.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Answer Is Maybe
programme.desc: Richard tells Christine that the reason he has good luck with women is that he 'says yes to life.' When Christine meets a good-looking man after paying a visit to New Christine, she breaks out of her mold and says yes when he asks her out to dinner.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Come to Papa Jeff
programme.desc: When Christine's parents can't make it to Grandparent's Day at Ritchie's school, New Christine suggests that Jeff, the new man in Christine's life, go as Ritchie's special friend. Christine then learns that Jeff really is a grandfather.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Oh God, Yes
programme.desc: Ritchie returns from a church festival with Richard and new Christine with a newfound interest in religion. Christine, who once had a bad experience at church, re-examines her beliefs and with Ritchie and Matthew in tow, decides to give God another go.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Barb moves in with Christine after announcing that she and Pete plan to divorce. Meanwhile, when Barb moves in, Matthew relocates to Ritchie's room where he discovers his nephew's strange sleep habits.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Champ
programme.desc: When 'meanie moms' Marly and Lindsay guilt Christine into serving hot lunch at Ritchie's school, she finds herself serving with Stan and vows not to sleep with him again. Meanwhile, she and Matthew decide they must take control of their dating lives.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Playdate With Destiny
programme.desc: Christine's crush on Mr. Harris makes her lose her composure around him at Ritchie's school's fundraising gala. When Ritchie wins the raffle prize of a playdate with him, Christine is thrilled, until Richard's father-son plans threaten to spoil the fun.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Women 'N Tuition
programme.desc: Christine tries to make some sacrifices in order to pay for Ritchie's rising school tuition. Meanwhile, Matthew realizes he hasn't been living up to his potential and considers some extreme changes.

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '93
programme.desc: In the middle of the Conners' Thanksgiving Day meal Nana reveals a dark family secret.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: Roseanne gets carried away with her punishment of D.J., who seems headed for delinquency.

programme.title: Roseanne: Suck Up or Shut Up
programme.desc: When Roseanne joins a stuffy women's group with the intention of increasing business at the diner, it puts D.J. in a tough spot with a schoolmate. Meanwhile, Becky and Mark squabble over Mark's attendance at school.

programme.title: Roseanne: Busted
programme.desc: Dan tries to act as peacemaker between Becky and Mark. Roseanne heads to Chicago when she learns David and Darlene are living together.

programme.title: Roseanne: David vs. Goliath
programme.desc: David admits that he was living with Darlene in Chicago and gets kicked out of the house.

programme.title: Roseanne: Everyone Comes to Jackie's
programme.desc: Roseanne wants David to move back with them, and Dan never wants to see him again.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Make Room for Daddy
programme.desc: Roseanne finds herself in the midst of a huge family squabble when Fred decides to take Dan's advice and sue pregnant Jackie for custody of the unborn child.

programme.title: Roseanne: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Roseanne and pregnant Jackie visit a gay bar with Nancy and her friend, Sharon, Roseanne feels pretty smug and cool - until she is overwhelmed by a surprisingly affectionate admirer.

programme.title: Roseanne: Labor Day
programme.desc: The usual symptoms - panic, pain and incredible joy - announce the imminent arrival of Jackie's child. Even though Fred is the father, Roseanne struggles to limit his participation in the process.

programme.title: Roseanne: Past Imperfect
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan have different ideas about covering one of Dan's father's missed alimony payments. Meanwhile, new parents, Fred and Jackie, still can't figure out whether they love each other or not.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lies My Father Told Me
programme.desc: Ed is lying to Dan about the mental state of his mother, but Roseanne tries to get Dan to accept that the lie was really an act of kindness.

programme.title: Roseanne: I Pray the Lord My Stove to Keep
programme.desc: When Roseanne accepts delivery of too many new stoves for her diner, young D.J., who has found religion, begins spouting words of conscience and surprises Roseanne with some serious ethical questions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Body by Jake
programme.desc: When Bev breaks her pelvis in the retirement home, Roseanne and Dan are shocked to find out how it happened. As a result, Bev is forced to move in with them rather than die of embarrassment in the retirement community.

programme.title: Roseanne: Isn't It Romantic?
programme.desc: While Fred seeks advice on how to propose marriage to Jackie, Dan and Roseanne are rekindling their romance with inspiration from the soap opera 'One Life to Live'.

programme.title: Roseanne: Altar Egos
programme.desc: When they have a titanic ego clash, Roseanne is worried about the future of Fred and Jackie's relationship. It seems they just can't make up their minds, or egos, about walking down the aisle together.

programme.title: Roseanne: Nine Is Enough
programme.desc: Roseanne's announcement that she is pregnant again leads to her and Dan debating kicking Becky out of the house to make room. Jackie and Fred squabble over sleeping arrangements.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: River Monsters: Congo Killer
programme.desc: Wade learns about the violent legends surrounding the Congo River.

programme.title: River Monsters: Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates three mysterious deaths in three South American countries on his most remote mission to date.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: European Freshwater Beasts
programme.desc: In Germany, extreme angler Jeremy Wade tracks the wels catfish, which has been causing an uproar by going after swimmers. Then in Chernobyl, he races time and radiation to search for a monster responsible for a series of grizzly attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters: Ice Cold Killer
programme.desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey will take him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway, where he races against the Arctic storm threatening to end his quest.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: European Freshwater Beasts
programme.desc: In Germany, extreme angler Jeremy Wade tracks the wels catfish, which has been causing an uproar by going after swimmers. Then in Chernobyl, he races time and radiation to search for a monster responsible for a series of grizzly attacks.

programme.desc: When a sea monster washes up on an English beach, Jeremy Wade sets off to unmask the beast. His journey will take him to the ice sheets of Greenland and the fjords of Norway, where he races against the Arctic storm threatening to end his quest.

programme.title: River Monsters: Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, a fishing community is being terrorized by something in the water that's left behind a trail of bloodied victims. The only clue they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it's left behind.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Flesh Eaters
programme.desc: Wade seeks the notorious flesh eaters of the Amazon, including a fish that can swallow a man whole.

programme.title: River Monsters: American Killers
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade normally travels into the most remote regions searching for freshwater monsters, but recently he's been getting reports of killers from an unexpected location, America.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Welcome to Our World
programme.desc: A baby klipspringer is born on one of the coldest nights of the season and is miraculously nursed back to health. The California condor team at the Safari Park goes to unbelievable lengths to save this highly endangered species.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: New Day for an Old Tortoise
programme.desc: Hunter the koala is ready for a mate. Jaws the Galápagos tortoise isn't feeling well and the zoo staff works to bring him out of his shell. The Safari Park has not one but two baby giraffe calves that need to be hand-reared simultaneously.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: A Lion's Tale
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers prepare Aria the rambunctious black rhino for her new life on the open African Plains exhibit. Zoo staff cares for 15-year-old legend M'bari the lion and his mate, Etosha. A vulture chick learns to eat from a surrogate puppet.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium
programme.desc: The Zoo says goodbye to beloved pandas Bai-Yun and Xiao Liwu as mother and cub prepare to return to China. Tembo the retired 'Hollywood' elephant tries traditional Chinese medicine for her arthritis. The Butterfly Jungle gets colored for the season.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Great Turtle Comeback
programme.desc: A charismatic ostrich named Olga works to be reunited with her flock. Buster the squirrel monkey is introduced to the zoo's troop of feisty females. A functionally extinct species of turtle finds new life, and everyone's favorite warthog is back.

programme.title: The Zoo: New Chick on the Block
programme.desc: A popular sea lion falls ill after ingesting a foreign object. The avian team devises a plan to increase the cock-of-the-rocks population. Endangered snakes are coupled for breeding, and Andean bear cubs meet their fans.

programme.title: The Zoo: Beloved Bugs
programme.desc: The zoo anxiously awaits the arrival of a snow leopard called K2's fourth cub. The staff is pleased when a pair of Andean condors embrace their new enclosure, while a squirmy binturong fights his annual vaccination.

programme.title: The Zoo: Fawns Become Friends
programme.desc: Two sickly newborn fawns form an unbreakable bond while they are hand-reared by staff. Leopard Khazo gets a surprise that enhances her life, and tensions run high as the reptile staff attempts to collect blood from Cuban crocs.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Movie: Enough
programme.desc: A working class woman finds her circumstances greatly improved after marrying a wealthy contractor. After learning of his abusive tendencies, she goes on the run and trains herself to fight back.

programme.title: Movie: No Good Deed
programme.desc: A dangerous escaped convict poses as a man having car trouble in order to invade the home of a former District Attorney, who is there alone with her two small children.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins
programme.desc: A successful Los Angeles talk show host heads home to the Deep South to reunite with his family. Once there, he learns how easy it is fall back into old rivalries.

programme.desc: When Martin's CD Walkman disappears, he accuses all of his good friends of taking it.

programme.title: Martin: Guard Your Grill

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When the small screen TV in the apartment needs replacing, Martin is enticed into buying a big-screen TV, and uses the money from Martin and Gina's combined checking account to purchase it.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: The Great American Hero

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: Hart Medication
programme.desc: Kevin inadvertently takes drug-laden candies while in the company of an annoying acquaintance, Rapper, Lil Tweetzie. Kevin ends up out of control at Nelly's event.

programme.title: Real Husbands of Hollywood: Hart Medication
programme.desc: Kevin checks into the 'country club' Realizations Rehabilitation Centre in Malibu for some court mandated therapy. Things go from bad to worse until Nia Long checks in to work on her own issues.

programme.title: The Parkers: Practice What You Preach

programme.title: The Parkers: Could It Be You?
programme.desc: Andell is desperate for some alone time with her new boyfriend, so she sets up a date.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Little Change Never Hurt Anyone
programme.desc: Just as Nikki and Johnnie's relationship gets serious, he is offered a job in New York.

programme.title: The Parkers: At Last
programme.desc: While Nikki plans for her wedding, Professor Oglevee realizes he is in love with her.

programme.desc: Will gets caught up in a sorority prank that is meant to teach him to respect women.

programme.desc: Will and Carlton's friendship is strained by Will's on-going relationship with Lisa.

programme.desc: A couple's big win was the break they desperately needed to move out of their cramped basement rental and give their two children a better life. David Bromstad helps them search the suburbs outside Boston for the perfect family dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: My Lottery Dream Stable

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Greece

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Baja Mexico
programme.desc: Andrew explores the peninsula of Baja in Mexico where the land is harsh but the people and the food are out of this world.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Final Word
programme.desc: Between 1960 and 1975, Hans conducted several investigations of Franklin Castle, one of America's most haunted houses. Strangely, he refused to publish his findings. The team travels to Ohio to uncover why he intentionally buried the mysterious case.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Ties That Burn
programme.desc: In 1976, Hans helped the spirit of a grieving widow pass over, bringing peace to a terrified family, until the alarming paranormal activity returned. The team heads to the quiet coastal town of Port Clyde, Maine, to investigate the resurgent haunting.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Forever Home
programme.desc: In 1969, Hans' investigation of Howard Lodge was abruptly cut short by the home's owner. The team returns to uncover the haunting reality behind this stately Maryland manor's unnatural grip on the living.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: Don't Send Them to Heaven
programme.desc: In 1968, Hans fled an unassuming farmhouse out of fear of possession at the hands of a powerful entity. Reports of the current owner's paranormal encounters sends the team to Waterford, Maine, to confront the dark presence haunting the historic home.

programme.title: The Holzer Files: The Ghost That Got Away
programme.desc: The team reopens a case that eluded Hans for decades as they unlock the iron gates of a Virginia mansion for its first-ever paranormal investigation. They seek out the spirit of a young woman said to roam the grounds, weeping for her lost love.

programme.desc: Dez is filming his first big movie, and the whole gang jumps in to help. Austin nabs the starring role, Trish gets to play lots of characters and Ally offers to help out behind the camera. When it's Austin's turn, something triggers a fear and he panics.

programme.title: Jessie: Badfellas
programme.desc: Jessie has her hands full trying to keep a watchful eye on Emma, who has a major crush on bad boy Vincent.

programme.title: Jessie: A Doll's Outhouse
programme.desc: After the girls watch a scary movie, Jessie tries to help Zuri conquer her fear of dolls by confessing her own fear of porta-potties. Cameron teaches Ravi how to impress a girl, and Bertram listens to opera non-stop to win a radio contest.

programme.title: Jessie: Beauty and the Beasts
programme.desc: At a pageant, Jesse runs into her nemesis Nanny Agatha. Luke and Ravi play practical jokes on Bertram.

programme.title: Bluey: Muffin Cone/ Circus/ Road Trip
programme.desc: Muffin has to wear a cone of shame! Bluey is the ringmaster in a game of circus! The Heelers go on a road trip!

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Kapowie! / Car Trouble
programme.desc: Cricket earns a role in Big Coffee’s new TV commercial but loses his confidence. Bill trades his pickup in for a cutting-edge electric car, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Desserted/ The Gifted
programme.desc: Cricket treats his family to dinner, but Bill is suspicious about how he plans to pay for it. Tilly and Cricket battle to see if Bill lies about liking their Father's Day gifts.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Time Crisis/ Gramma Driver
programme.desc: Remy's plan for his whole life is thrown into question when he is unprepared for a violin recital. Later, Gramma becomes a rideshare driver, only to find her best customers are thieves.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Tilly Style/ I, Farmbot

programme.title: Big City Greens: Friend Con/ Flimflammed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler and Bill hit it off and become friends at Farm Con. Cricket stumbles into having one hundred dollars and immediately buys into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Greens' Acres/ Dolled Up
programme.desc: Young Bill will do whatever it takes to keep the family farm in business. When Tilly and Nancy celebrate Saxon's birthday at a fancy doll store, they set their sights on a seat next to Cantaloupe Sinclair, the tea party's posh VIP.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Ding Dongers/ Animation Abomination
programme.desc: Remy uses Cricket's antics to gain views and likes on a new video-sharing app. Then, When Cricket and Tilly learn that Gloria has an internship at the animation studio that produces their favorite cartoon, they beg her to bring them for a visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Fast Foodie/ Spaghetti Theory
programme.desc: When a Burger Clown franchise opens next door, Cricket tries to prove to Bill that he can eat fast food for every meal with no ill effects. Then, Tilly and Cricket debate whether the lives of people in Big City are intertwined.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie's Big Break
programme.desc: Jessie gets her big break as a stunt double to popular Australian actress Shaylee Michaels and the two become fast friends.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie's Big Break

programme.desc: A group of teenage zombies enroll in Seabrook High School and work together to show Seabrook what they can achieve when they embrace their differences and celebrate what makes them a community.

programme.desc: A cheerleader and a football players are preparing to go off to their prom. They don't realize that they are facing danger, in the form of teenage werewolves that threaten to derail their plans for the perfect night.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Politics & Public Policy Today

programme.title: Public Affairs Events
programme.desc: Public affairs events, congressional hearings, speeches, and interviews.

programme.title: Washington Journal
programme.desc: A political call-in program that touches on political and legislative issues.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Debbie Hawk
programme.desc: When Debbie Hawk vanished, her friends and family were left searching for answers. Investigators discovered that before she went missing, Debbie planned to reveal secrets. Police wondered if silencing her was a motive for murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.desc: When a young woman who was just starting out in life is found assaulted and stabbed to death in her boyfriend's home, detectives work tirelessly to uncover a killer who had previously been above suspicion, leaving the town and police force stunned.

programme.title: A Love to Kill For: Gypsy Rose & Nick
Snapped: Killer Couples: Rachael Mullenix & Ian Allen
programme.desc: When an aspiring actress is found brutally murdered, authorities uncover family secrets, and a forbidden love affair that burned with deadly intensity.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Kelly Sifuentez & Christian Olsen
programme.desc: A taboo romance between a mother and her daughter's ex-boyfriend becomes the focus of police when two dead bodies are discovered.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Airika Lijegren & Ryan Martinez
programme.desc: A couple's secret love affair ends in a gruesome double murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Heather Mack & Tommy Schaefer
programme.desc: A mother-daughter trip to paradise is cut short by a shocking crime.

programme.desc: Features couples whose passion drives them to commit terrible criminal acts.

programme.desc: An investigation into the mysterious death of a loving mother leads authorities to uncover a diabolical plot hatched close to home.

programme.desc: A woman's death is ruled a suicide until a new investigation forces police to question if it is a case of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: When a married woman begins a steamy affair with her handsome new boss, things quickly take a dark and deadly turn.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Deceit
programme.desc: A family mourned the loss of a young mother in a house fire. Authorities ruled it an accident. Then, years later, there was another accident and second loved one was gone.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Cold Justice: Preacher's Mother

programme.title: Movie: Underworld
programme.desc: A vampire warrior finds herself falling in love with a human who has been bitten by a werewolf, the sworn enemies of her clan.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World

programme.title: Life Story: First Steps

programme.title: Wild India

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair
programme.desc: In a remote Louisiana swamp, the ruins of a massive industrial operation suggest that something evil once happened here, and new discoveries at this eerie site reveal what these abandoned buildings were for and why they were deserted.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: American Atlantis
programme.desc: An abandoned town in the Nevada desert are the ruins of an American Atlantis, destroyed by catastrophic floods when the Hoover Dam was built. Today, experts investigate the secrets of this eerie ghost town as water levels recede and the city re-emerges.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Ghost of Black Mountain
programme.desc: Ghostly remnants of a beautifully constructed town in the remote backwoods of Kentucky suggests a forgotten tale of utter catastrophe and devastation; experts investigate and uncover the dark and oppressive history of a deadly industrial mining complex.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Capone's Escape Tunnels
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates rumors of a secret underground escape route used by the infamous gangster Al Capone. Washington State, Rob tries to uncover who or what built a vast landscape of earthen mounds in Washington State.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Atlantis in America
programme.desc: New theories claim that the legendary sunken city of Atlantis could have actually been in the Americas. Rob Nelson and Stefan Burns use cutting-edge technology to investigate evidence that might shed more light on one of the world's greatest mysteries.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Lost Pirate City Treasure
programme.desc: When an infamous pirate city sunk into the sea after a massive earthquake, a wealthy pirate's treasure might have disappeared with it. Rob and Stefan use cutting-edge technology to hunt for the treasure of Henry Morgan.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Great Lakes Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: Rob Nelson descends into a cave 30 feet beneath Texas in search of evidence of a mass extinction event. Then, he heads to Lake Michigan to investigate an unexplained, Bermuda Triangle-like phenomenon that has caused ships to disappear for centuries.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Frozen Heart
programme.desc: Glenn Godfrey was Alaska's top cop, but he may not be able to protect himself and his family from an evil force unleashed by an ill-advised romance.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: The House Out on Wade Road
programme.desc: Byron and Michele Wright overcome broken homes to find solace in one another. But when their blissful union falls apart and a new man arrives on the scene, it unearths violent secrets and a shocking truth.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Patio Door
programme.desc: A bitter sibling rivalry takes a dark turn when one sister recruits a local gang to take part in a deadly game of pay back.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jayme Closs Comes Home
programme.desc: Hear about disappearance and return of a Wisconsin teenager. Jayme Closs disappeared on October 15, 2018. Police responding to a strange 911 call from the house found both her parents dead. Closs was found alive on January 10, 70 miles from her home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Suspicion: The Tiger King Mystery
programme.desc: '48 Hours: Suspicion' uncovers shocking new information in the disappearance of Carole Baskin's former husband Don Lewis.

programme.title: Queen of Meth: discovery+ Sneak Peek: Daughter of Anarchy
programme.desc: On a journey of self-discovery, Lori Arnold returns to her hometown to reconcile how her life circumstances led her down a path to become the 'Queen of Meth' and relive a heyday when, for a brief moment she had the world at her fingertips.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: A life spared by a jury's mistake; a brawl after a delayed hearing; a man wearing no pants walks into a courthouse.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Vanished
programme.desc: So-Cal surfer and tech entrepreneur, Chris Smith, dreams of making a tidy sum of money and then surfing off into the sunset. It seems his dreams have come true, but all is not as it appears.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Suspicion: The Tiger King Mystery
programme.desc: '48 Hours: Suspicion' uncovers shocking new information in the disappearance of Carole Baskin's former husband Don Lewis.

programme.title: Queen of Meth: discovery+ Sneak Peek: Daughter of Anarchy
programme.desc: On a journey of self-discovery, Lori Arnold returns to her hometown to reconcile how her life circumstances led her down a path to become the 'Queen of Meth' and relive a heyday when, for a brief moment she had the world at her fingertips.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Abuse of Power
programme.desc: A life spared by a jury's mistake; a brawl after a delayed hearing; a man wearing no pants walks into a courthouse.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Somebody's Watching
programme.desc: A fire chief's wife is found burnt to death in her home. An autopsy reveals the cause of death was not the fire, but a gunshot to the head, shocking this small Louisiana town. This arson turned homicide leaves a killer to be found.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Murder of Haley Anderson
programme.desc: When a young nursing student at Binghamton University in New York went missing, her roommates used the app Find My Friends to track her down. What the app led them to launched an international manhunt for her killer.

programme.title: Wives With Knives: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: After two failed relationships Michelle Covington is swept off her feet by a former high school classmate. But excessive drinking makes him abusive. The couple gets in a nasty fight with the boyfriend in danger of bleeding to death from a stab wound.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Murders
programme.desc: Pennsylvania native Janet Lynn Mickey's greatest dream is to start her own family. So, when she marries college football-star Darrell Tyburski her future seems secure. But when the young couple has children, they are led down the darkest path.

programme.title: Diabolical: Devil Wears False Eyelashes
programme.desc: Three men die over a span of a dozen years, with no suspicion of wrongdoing and no files charged. But when a deadly car explosion rips through downtown Pensacola, Florida, a new investigation begins. And all suspicion points toward just one person.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Journal of Death
programme.desc: Single mother Dana Laskowski is found strangled to death in her home one night when her triplets are visiting their father. The crime scene suggests she knew her attacker and it seems there are a few people who had an unhealthy obsession with her.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Satanic Homicide
programme.desc: When two friends are shot to death in their beds, the words 'Satan loves you' is left as a message in the kitchen. As the case widens, it becomes clear that there are several people who may have wanted these women dead, and Satan isn't one of them.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: There Will Be Blood
programme.desc: A 63-year-old man is gunned down in his own home just days before Christmas. As investigators in Spokane, Washington dig into the victim's business life in search of a motive, they uncover a host of shady deals and a few desperate men.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Box On Her Doorstep
programme.desc: Each time she was targeted by an anonymous predator, Sarah Garone ran to her stepfather, Gary Hardy. She always felt something about Gary was creepy, but as the events got more disturbing, she never imagined someone trusted could be the one to hurt her.

programme.title: See No Evil: Meet Me at Midnight
programme.desc: In Calgary, Alberta, 24-year-old Ryan Lane receives a late-night call and heads out to meet the mystery caller. He is never heard from again. Calgary Police Service turns to surveillance video to locate Ryan and finds evidence of a shocking betrayal.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Virtual Hitchhiking
programme.desc: For years, locals have feared a stretch of highway that is notorious for disappearances. Then a teenager goes missing after meeting someone online, and police discover a predator far more dangerous than they ever imagined - a serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Farming for a Motive
programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, Dianne Watts, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend, are murdered. The town of McMinnville is turned upside down, knowing there is a killer amongst them.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Park
programme.desc: A deceased female's brutally beaten and sexually assaulted body turns up in Farmington, New Mexico. With an unidentified victim and plenty of suspects, detectives struggle with one of the most challenging 'whodunits' of their career.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Twisted Upside Down
programme.desc: The streets of Kalamazoo, Michigan are awash with rumors about 69-year-old, William Gray.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Puzzle Piece
programme.desc: When the battered body of Bianca Rainer, mother of two young girls, is found in rural Arkansas, the police have just one unusual clue, a puzzle piece found stuck to her body. But they know if they find the missing puzzle, they will find her murderer.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Dead Man's ID
programme.desc: Michael Hess is a wanted prison escapee on the run with a new identity and has been living in the same town he is wanted in for two decades. Hess learns to beat the system and enjoy his new life of work, weed and women before he's busted.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Hammered on a Sailboat
programme.desc: A fugitive murders a man and flees to New York, where he plans a daring escape, while another breaks out of jail by overpowering a guard.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Roll the Dice
programme.desc: With 41 arrests and no convictions, Philip Williams had no worries that stabbing his ex in a parking lot would give him any trouble. But when he became a wanted man, he hit the road. Surviving on his gambling wins, Williams kept on the move.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got No Fingerprints
programme.desc: Jerry Bowen fled before sentencing of the murder of Brenda Breckenridge. Bowen erased his fingerprints with acid and befriended homeless men to assume their identities. After 7 yrs, detectives were able to find enough remaining prints to declare a match.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Plastic Surgery
programme.desc: Courtenay Savage is an ex-cop with a loaded gun aimed at a friend's trailer. She has no idea she is caught on tape. After an arrest and posting bail, she goes on the run, leaving ties to the police department and the sex industry.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Beheading the Taliban
programme.desc: In Afghanistan in 2006, US Army Green Berets take on nearly 1000 Taliban fighters in one of the most intense battles of the War on Terror. Five years after the 9/ 11 attacks, Task Force 31 launches a full-scale attack on a hill called Sperwan Ghar.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Turning the Tide
programme.desc: As WWII erupted, there was a race to develop new weapons and ways to wage war. Both the Allies and the Germans were searching for something that would give them a knockout blow and bring the war to a quick end.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.desc: After inviting the Diaz's on a trip to Mewni as a last minute anniversary present, Star and Marco must save them from a many-headed serpent. Star must fight off Ludo and his army of monsters when they crash Brittney Wong's birthday party.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewberty/ Pixtopia
programme.desc: Marco and his friends run up Star’s Magic Mirror bill with prank phone calls, so they all travel to a dimension of pixies to pay it off. Star starts sprouting hearts all over her body, the telltale sign of Mewberty.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Lobster Claws/ Sleep Spells
programme.desc: Ludo fires one of his minions, Lobster Claws, so Marco and Star help him adjust to life on Earth. Marco uses psychology to help Star when she starts using magic in her sleep.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Blood Moon Ball/ Fortune Cookies
programme.desc: Star accepts her ex-boyfriend Tom's invitation to Demon Prom, but Marco is suspicious of Tom's intentions and crashes the prom to prevent Star from getting her heart broken again.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Freeze Day/ Royal Pain
programme.desc: Star accidentally freezes time with her wand, so she and Marco must travel to the Plains of Time to convince Father Time to get back on his time wheel.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: St. Olga's Reform School for Wayward Princesses
programme.desc: To give Pony Head a good birthday, Star must face her greatest fear - going to St. Olga’s Reform School for Wayward Princesses, to bust her out. Once there, Star and Marco find the school is even worse than they thought and their plan won't be easy.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Mewnipendance Day/ The Banagic Incident
programme.desc: Star leads a battle re-enactment as part of a Mewni Independence Day celebration with her friends on Earth. Then, Star sees a commercial for a magical Earth product and sets off on her own to buy it.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Interdimensional Field Trip/ Marco Grows a Beard
programme.desc: Star leads a class field trip to a museum in another dimension and puts the entire class in danger. Then, when Star flubs the spell used to help Marco grow a beard, the beard grows out of control and engulfs the house.

programme.title: Star vs. the Forces of Evil: Storm the Castle
programme.desc: When Marco is captured by Toffee and held for wand-ransom, Star enters into an unlikely alliance with Ludo and Buff Frog.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insulated Evidence
programme.desc: A young college student is found strangled and badly burned. Investigators get a break when a trace evidence expert uncovers the murder weapon in the spool of a vacuum.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 1
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Storm Shelter Showdown: Part 2
programme.desc: The Raneys help a Missouri homestead with a hungry bear, disease-carrying ticks, no food, and no power.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: $1 Million or Bust
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt-water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond, and Matt must build a large-scale solar still to decontaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Risky Business
programme.desc: In a race against the coming snow, the Raneys push beyond their limits to finish two cabins, harvest the garden and mount a hunting expedition. But when a risky project results in a devastating injury, the family is in danger of losing it all.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Stairway to Heaven
programme.desc: As Marty recovers from a bad fall, the Raneys scramble against the oncoming winter to finish cabin walls and build a staircase from an ancient family spruce. Matt leads a last-ditch moose hunt pivotal to keeping them stocked with meat through spring.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: The Bears and the Bees
programme.desc: The Raney family arrives at a homestead with a bee-obsessed owner unintentionally attracting bears with his hives. Marty bush-engineers a windmill to pump water to a new bathhouse, but the dangerous North Carolina wind threatens progress.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Raney Days Are A-Comin'
programme.desc: With only two weeks left to finish their ambitious self-rescue, Marty races to complete the walls of the log cabin. Misty expands the garden and builds a goat shelter, while Matt takes the next generation on a hunt for gold.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Do Or Die
programme.desc: Marty struggles to finish the cliff-top cabin; the family risks another river crossing to get materials across for a final crucial build.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fury and Fire
programme.desc: Threatened by an approaching wildfire, Stuart and Toni Rinker need a quick solution to their failing Idaho homestead. The Raneys plan to fire-proof the Rinkers' cabin and build a firebreak.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Code and Conflict

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day

programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
